name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle look at how yesterday went at the practice. A few new patients reached out, some appointments moved through the calendar, and the day wrapped up without anything needing your immediate attention.

Nothing urgent on the board this morning — just wanted you to have the picture before chairs start filling up. If anything needs a closer look, it'll be waiting in your dashboard.

With care,
— Bright Smile Dental
